summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM customer authentication, retention features, and SEO clusters. Fixed critical frontend import/export issues. Backend APIs partially working with some critical bugs identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Save listing returns 500 error - CustomerSavedListing validation failed: vin: Path 'vin' is required
critical_bugs.details: Backend schema requires 'vin' field but frontend/API doesn't provide it

critical_bugs.issue: Recently viewed returns 500 error after adding items - Cast to ObjectId failed for string IDs
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks recently viewed functionality after items are added
critical_bugs.details: VehicleListing model expects ObjectId format but service passes string IDs

minor_issues.impact: Minor - login works but wrong HTTP status

minor_issues.issue: Add recently viewed returns 201 instead of 200
minor_issues.impact: Minor - functionality works but wrong HTTP status

fixed_issues.issue: Import/export mismatch causing 'Element type is invalid' error
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Fixed export statements and import in App.js

working_features.details: Form loads correctly, login successful, redirects to customer cabinet
Dashboard loads with proper navigation, statistics, and user welcome message
Page loads correctly with filter tabs, shows empty state when no clusters available

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix backend schema issues: 1) Update SaveListingPayload to make 'vin' field optional or provide default value, 2) Fix ObjectId casting issue in recently viewed functionality by ensuring consistent ID format between VehicleListing model and retention service

success_percentage.backend: 70% - Core auth working, retention APIs have critical bugs
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All pages loading and working correctly after fixes
